content:
Thought about using the cloudflare domain purchase API, but it's far too expensive. The cheapest domain is $4.xx and at scale (free trials) its going to burn through thousands per day.
Spaceship has domains for as little as .75c but is it possible to purchase the domain via api, add the DNS/name servers, and have a cloudflare post the template/inject dynamic variables in ~20 seconds? I think DNS is the only hangup here, because as of now I do it through a subdomain via cloudflare and the whole process takes about 10 seconds. I need to change to a root domain at scale and I cant find a solution. Best solution ill venmo $50!

  submitted by   /u/FSOHelp
[link]   [comments]
